channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Morgan McSweeney resigns as Keir Starmer’s chief of staff
item.description: Longtime aide has said he takes ‘full responsibility’ for advising PM to appoint Peter Mandelson as US ambassador UK politics live – latest updates Mo...

item.title: Veteran French politician quits as head of prestigious institute after Epstein links revealed
item.description: Former culture minister Jack Lang resigns from Arab World Institute in Paris and is also subject of tax investigation Jack Lang, a former French cultu...

item.title: Morgan McSweeney resigns and says he takes ‘full responsibility’ for advising Starmer to appoint Mandelson – UK politics live
item.description: McSweeney, who masterminded landslide 2024 election win, resigns as PM’s chief of staff after Mandelson revelations Morgan McSweeney resigns as Keir S...

item.title: Japan election: Sanae Takaichi’s ruling conservatives on course for landslide win
item.description: Exit polls point to public endorsement of new prime minister on day of blizzards and freezing conditions Japan’s conservative governing party is on co...

item.title: Social media companies are being sued for harming their users’ mental health – but are the platforms addictive?
item.description: Experts say the term ‘addiction’ is be overused and, for social media use, could be difficult to prove Forthcoming legal proceedings against Meta and ...

item.title: The political strategist who became Starmer's right-hand man
item.description: McSweeney, long considered instrumental to the rise of the PM, derived his power and influence from his track record as a political strategist.

item.title: US skier Vonn 'deserved better ending' as crash ends Olympic dream
item.description: American superstar skier Lindsey Vonn "deserved a better ending" after suffering heartbreak in what could be her final Olympic event as she crashes in...

item.title: England deny Nepal in final-ball World Cup thriller
item.description: England fight from the brink to avoid a major shock and beat an inspired Nepal by four runs in their opening match of the T20 World Cup in Mumbai.

item.title: Norway's Klaebo wins first of potential six golds at Games
item.description: After eight matches and five days of competition at the Winter Olympics, Bruce Mouat and Jen Dodds are finally beaten in Cortina.

item.title: Japan's governing party projected to win snap election majority
item.description: A coalition led by current Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is expected to clinch a decisive win, according to media projections after polls closed.
